title: Probabilistic Active Learning in Datastreams
text_0: Idea: Probabilistic Active Learning in Datastreams is an extension to Multi-Class Probabilistic Active Learning (McPAL) (see `pool.ProbabilisticAL`). It uses McPAL to assess the spatial utility. The Balanced Incremental Quantile Filter (`BalancedIncrementalQuantileFilter`), that is implemented within the default budget manager, is used to evaluate the temporal utility.
